scripts.docker:builder: docker buildx create --name lisq-builder --use || docker buildx use lisq-builder
scripts.docker:build: docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64 -t lukevinskywynn/lisq:latest -t lukevinskywynn/lisq:$npm_package_version --push .
scripts.docker:release: npm run docker:login && npm run docker:builder && npm run docker:build
scripts.deploy:marketing: npm run build --workspace=marketing && cd marketing && npx wrangler pages deploy dist
